title: leucanthemum alpinum var. pseudotomentosum
intro: Leucanthemum alpinum var. pseudotomentosum, also known as Alpine Daisy, is a flowering plant species in the Asteraceae family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which make it useful in treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and boost the immune system. Leucanthemum alpinum var. pseudotomentosum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
